title: where to buy
wikitext:
[]: where to buy?             Quote Post by GodKingOsiris » Thu Mar 21, 2013 12:48 am anyone know where i can preorder or buy on release 3.0? both the dvd and bluray version. preferrably the version with the film strip.(will there be film strips?) I saw a preorder on j-list but it mentions no film strip or lack of. can someone list all the links/options to buy from. thank you.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 21, 2013 1:50 am Info in this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13969/Evangelion-30-on-Blu-ray-and-DVD-April-24th/ There is no film strip.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Mar 21, 2013 9:08 am I would suggest Amazon.co.jp since they'll have the price lower until the 24th.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Sat Mar 23, 2013 12:22 am I would recommend CDJapan since they give you the soundtrack and exclusive mouse-pad with Rei if you pre-order
